2026-04-23T08:02:39.4001982Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T08:02:39.4002553Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:39.4002993Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:39.4003956Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:39.4004279Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:39.4004521Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:39.4004678Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-23T08:02:39.4005257Z [36;1m{[0m
